column1:
Define NumPy arrays and understand their dimensionality and structure.  
Use NumPy functions to create, modify, and access arrays, including understanding array shape and indexing.  
Apply array manipulation functions such as insert, delete, reshape, resize, ravel, and transpose.  
Utilize NumPy mathematical operators and functions, including arithmetic, simple, aggregate, and matrix functions on arrays.  
Understand the concepts of array flattening, reshaping, and ordering (row-major vs. column-major).
